name: Nextcloud With Postgres
tagline: NextCloud is a self-hosted, open-source platform that provides file storage, collaboration, and communication tools for seamless data management.
description:
NextCloud is a self-hosted, open-source platform that provides file storage, collaboration, and communication tools for seamless data management.

Docs: https://docs.nextcloud.com?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  nextcloud:
    image: lscr.io/linuxserver/nextcloud:latest
    environment:
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
      - TZ=${TZ:-Europe/Paris}
      - POSTGRES_DB=${POSTGRES_DB:-nextcloud}
      - POSTGRES_USER=uedcd1cc46c
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=a18f619b4ef82af57f31be44d8a8e4cd
      - POSTGRES_HOST=nextcloud-db
      - REDIS_HOST=redis
      - REDIS_PORT=6379
    volumes:
      - nextcloud-config:/config
      - nextcloud-data:/data
    depends_on:
      nextcloud-db:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -f
        - http://127.0.0.1:80/status.php
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 15
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42075:80
  nextcloud-db:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    volumes:
      - nextcloud-postgresql-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_USER=uedcd1cc46c
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=a18f619b4ef82af57f31be44d8a8e4cd
      - POSTGRES_DB=${POSTGRES_DB:-nextcloud}
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - pg_isready -U $${POSTGRES_USER:-livb518dcca} -d $${POSTGRES_DB:-nextcloud_with_postgres}
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
  redis:
    image: redis:7.4-alpine
    volumes:
      - nextcloud-redis-data:/data
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - redis-cli
        - PING
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 20
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  nextcloud-config: null
  nextcloud-data: null
  nextcloud-postgresql-data: null
  nextcloud-redis-data: null
